title: Rules for the conduct of business
doc_html:
§472.  Rules for the conduct of business

Each district court may adopt rules for the conduct of business before it.  These rules shall be entered in the minutes of the court and published in the manner which the court deems most effective and practicable.
doc_text:
§472.  Rules for the conduct of business
Each district court may adopt rules for the conduct of business before it.  These rules shall be entered in the minutes of the court and published in the manner which the court deems most effective and practicable.
